refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall support achieving the customer-defined productivity target.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR includes specific measurement units ('m³/h' or 'ton/h'), which are implementation details related to how productivity is quantified. To keep the FR solution-neutral and focused on what the system must do, the measurement units are omitted. The FR is atomic as it expresses a single obligation: supporting achievement of the productivity target.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify through operational testing and data collection that the NGHE solution enables meeting or exceeding the customer-defined productivity target over the agreed evaluation period, independent of measurement units used.

candidate_dps: DP1: Monitor and report actual productivity metrics continuously
DP2: Adjust operational parameters dynamically to meet productivity targets
DP3: Provide feedback and alerts when productivity deviates from target
DP4: Integrate safety and operational policies into productivity management
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Monitor and report actual productivity metrics continuously

coupling_check.notes: Selecting continuous monitoring and reporting as the primary DP keeps the solution logically independent from control or adjustment mechanisms, supporting modularity and clear responsibility boundaries.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of reliable productivity measurement methods
Risk that monitoring alone may not ensure achieving productivity targets without adjustment mechanisms
Assumes operational policies do not conflict with productivity measurement processes
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider decomposing the FR further to separate measurement (monitoring) from control (adjustment) to maintain independence and clarity in DP selection.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: The NGHE Solution module encompasses the overall system responsible for monitoring and reporting productivity metrics, integrating data collection, processing, and reporting functionalities.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives raw operational data and sends processed productivity metrics.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Sends productivity reports to external systems or stakeholders.

module_containment_scores.notes: High cohesion as productivity monitoring is a core system function; minimal diffusion as data is mostly internal to this module.
Partial containment since vehicle sensors provide raw data, but processing and reporting extend beyond vehicle scope.
Low containment; teleoperation focuses on control rather than monitoring productivity.
Very low containment; safety services focus on alerts and safety, not productivity metrics.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: The NGHE Solution module is the most appropriate boundary for implementing DP1 because it centralizes data collection, processing, and reporting, minimizing diffusion and maximizing cohesion.
containment_risks: Potential overlap with Vehicle module for raw data acquisition may cause interface complexity.
If productivity metrics require real-time data from Teleoperation, some diffusion may occur.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: No revision recommended; DP1 is well contained within NGHE Solution. If needed, clarify interfaces with Vehicle for raw data to reduce diffusion.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The DP1 directly addresses the FR by specifying continuous monitoring and reporting of actual productivity metrics, which supports achieving the customer-defined productivity target. The acceptance criteria about reported productivity meeting or exceeding the target over the evaluation period aligns well with DP1's focus on monitoring and reporting.

diffusion_risks: Potential overlap with Vehicle module for raw data acquisition may cause interface complexity.
If productivity metrics require real-time data from Teleoperation, some diffusion may occur.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: The NGHE Solution module shows high cohesion and minimal diffusion with a containment score of 9 and diffusion score of 1, indicating that DP1 is well contained. Other modules have lower containment and higher diffusion scores, supporting the choice of NGHE Solution as the implementation boundary.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification is feasible as the NGHE Solution module includes interfaces for receiving raw operational data (Telemetry) and sending processed productivity metrics (Network Link), enabling measurement against the productivity target during representative operations.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Allocation is clear since the NGHE Solution module encompasses all necessary functions (data collection, processing, reporting) to realize DP1, with ownership clearly assigned to this module.

recommended_revisions: No revision recommended; DP1 is well contained within NGHE Solution. If needed, clarify interfaces with Vehicle for raw data to reduce diffusion.

decision.justification: All gates (FR->DP, DP->IM, FR->IM) have passed with strong justification and minimal diffusion risks. The DP1 is well contained within the NGHE Solution module, which has high cohesion and clear ownership. Verification feasibility and allocation clarity are confirmed. No revisions are recommended at this time, and the system design meets the high safety criticality requirements with appropriate containment and interface clarity.

assumptions: The NGHE Solution module interfaces effectively with Vehicle and Teleoperation modules for raw data acquisition.
The productivity metrics reported by NGHE Solution accurately reflect operational performance.
The containment and diffusion scores reliably indicate architectural quality.
open_risks: Potential interface complexity with Vehicle module for raw data acquisition.
Possible diffusion if real-time data from Teleoperation is required.
evidence_needed: Interface specifications between NGHE Solution and Vehicle/Teleoperation modules.
Operational data demonstrating productivity metric accuracy and timeliness.
